name:
large misty room with strange
unreadable letters over all the exits.
description:
I'm in a large misty room with strange
unreadable letters over all the exits.
items_start: Sign says `LIMBO. Find right exit and live again!`
hints: You died and are in Limbo. One exit leads back to life, the others lead to Hell.
Only one direction leads to safety. Most exits go to Hell (room 24). Choose carefully.
Go EAST to return to the forest (room 11) and live again. All other directions except NORTH lead to permanent death.
notes: Limbo - the afterlife room reached when you die. EAST returns to the forest (room 11) to live again. NORTH goes to the endless corridor (room 32). S, W, and D all lead to Hell (room 24, permanent death). Critical to go EAST.
